subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson, spoken on 1909-08-15
subcodes.first_line: As Christ said, the Word is like seed. Some seed falls upon barren ground and withers; some upon stony ground.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @high station of the true believer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
